message:
fix(doctor): add 5s timeout to wezterm process calls in diagnostics

run_diagnostics() called `wezterm cli list --format json` via
Command::output() which blocks indefinitely when WezTerm is installed
but the mux server isn't running. This caused doctor tests to hang
in CI/headless environments.

- Add run_cmd_with_timeout() helper using spawn + try_wait polling
- Apply 5s timeout to both `wezterm --version` and `wezterm cli list`
- Add specific error messages for timeout cases
- Fix doctor_fixture_healthy_workspace test to tolerate WezTerm-related
  errors (they depend on runtime, not workspace health)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
